mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_revision(post_id, version_num, base_version, is_base, patch_hash, chunk_hash, request_id, create_time) VALUES(#{postId}, #{versionNum}, #{baseVersion}, #{isBase}, #{patchHash}, #{chunkHash}, #{requestId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT post_id, version_num, base_version, is_base, patch_hash, chunk_hash, request_id, create_time FROM content_revision WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY version_num DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT post_id, version_num, base_version, is_base, patch_hash, chunk_hash, request_id, create_time FROM content_revision WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY version_num DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
